definitions.technical: The recurring monthly schedule on which a stablecoin issuer must have its reserve composition independently examined and the results certified by its CEO and CFO.
definitions.lay: The monthly schedule that stablecoin issuers must follow to have their reserves checked by an outside firm and signed off by their top executives.
definitions.parenthetical: (the mandatory monthly reserve examination and certification schedule)
definitions.legal_significance: Monthly attestation cycles are a cornerstone of the GENIUS Act's transparency framework. Gaps or delays in the cycle could signal compliance failures that affect an issuer's permitted status.
